## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Start the gateway with `nexus gateway run`
2. Run command `...`
3. Observe error `...`

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or CLI output.

```
paste output here
```

## Environment

- Nexus version: (run `nexus --version`)
- Node.js version: (run `node --version`)
- OS: (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- AI provider: (Anthropic / OpenAI)
- Install method: (npm global / monorepo tsx / Docker)

## Additional Context

Any other context, config snippets (redact credentials), or screenshots.
